response.global_analysis: The video is a conversational 3D segment. Audio phonetically matches the English dialogue. No vocal music detected. Timestamps are strictly tied to vocal audio activation. On-screen text for rules and quiz questions used to ensure precision in transcription.

subtitles.original: I think we should play a game, maybe a game?
subtitles.english: I think we should play a game, maybe a game?

subtitles.original: Ooh!
subtitles.english: Ooh!

subtitles.original: And then whoever wins gets ice cream!
subtitles.english: And then whoever wins gets ice cream!

subtitles.original: Ice cream!

subtitles.english: ATTEEEEEEEENTION!

subtitles.english: Great, here comes Deez.

subtitles.original: Up and at 'em, maggots!
subtitles.english: Up and at 'em, maggots!

subtitles.original: It's time to get to work!
subtitles.english: It's time to get to work!

subtitles.original: No slacking off while I, Sergeant Smokey,
subtitles.english: No slacking off while I, Sergeant Smokey,

subtitles.original: am busting my scales off for you!
subtitles.english: am busting my scales off for you!

subtitles.english: Hey! Long time no see!

subtitles.original: How are you doing? It's been so long!
subtitles.english: How are you doing? It's been so long!

subtitles.original: "Heeeey"?! GET IT TOGETHER!!!
subtitles.english: "Heeeey"?! GET IT TOGETHER!!!

subtitles.english: Now line up and stand at attention, peabrains!!

subtitles.original: Ah, okay, calm down, Deez.
subtitles.english: Ah, okay, calm down, Deez.

subtitles.original: Let's just do as Smokey says.
subtitles.english: Let's just do as Smokey says.

subtitles.original: It's his first big appearance, so he seems fired up.
subtitles.english: It's his first big appearance, so he seems fired up.

subtitles.english: Okay, I will do it for you, Liz.

subtitles.original: I will do it for you, Liz.
subtitles.english: I will do it for you, Liz.

subtitles.english: Alright, let's go. Huddle up!

subtitles.english: Hey, Smokey!

subtitles.original: Enough talking! Do I make myself clear!?
subtitles.english: Enough talking! Do I make myself clear!?

subtitles.original: SIR! YES! SIR!
subtitles.english: SIR! YES! SIR!

subtitles.original: I can't hear you!
subtitles.english: I can't hear you!

subtitles.original: SIR! YES! SIR!
subtitles.english: SIR! YES! SIR!

subtitles.original: Show me your war face!
subtitles.english: Show me your war face!

subtitles.original: Headquarters tells me you've been getting sloppy,
subtitles.english: Headquarters tells me you've been getting sloppy,

subtitles.original: so I'm here to set things straight!
subtitles.english: so I'm here to set things straight!

subtitles.original: Sloppy?
subtitles.english: Sloppy?

subtitles.original: to whip your sorry hides into shape!
subtitles.english: to whip your sorry hides into shape!

subtitles.english: Oh! Whoa! What the freak!

subtitles.english: Has that always been there?

subtitles.english: Let's go look! Let's go look!

subtitles.original: Oh the freak! Whoa!

subtitles.english: Alright, read the rules!

subtitles.original: Here we are. Let's see what it says.
subtitles.english: Here we are. Let's see what it says.

subtitles.original: Think Fast, Move Faster!
subtitles.english: Think Fast, Move Faster!

subtitles.original: This is a training exercise for brain and body.
subtitles.english: This is a training exercise for brain and body.

subtitles.original: Use the giant keyboard to input the answer.
subtitles.english: Use the giant keyboard to input the answer.

subtitles.english: The trial consists of 10 questions per person.

subtitles.original: If you're stuck, you can skip it for later.
subtitles.english: If you're stuck, you can skip it for later.

subtitles.original: Correct answers with more letters get more points.
subtitles.english: Correct answers with more letters get more points.

subtitles.original: Per my last email...
subtitles.english: Per my last email...

subtitles.original: Let's see who can rack up the most points!
subtitles.english: Let's see who can rack up the most points!

subtitles.original: No whining!
subtitles.english: No whining!

subtitles.original: Cecilia, you go first! Get in there!
subtitles.english: Cecilia, you go first! Get in there!

subtitles.original: Okay, I'll go first.
subtitles.english: Okay, I'll go first.

subtitles.original: It's okay, get out of my way! Get out of my way!
subtitles.english: It's okay, get out of my way! Get out of my way!

subtitles.english: Watch this guys, don't worry, I got this.

subtitles.english: Are you really ready? How ready are you?

subtitles.english: Where do I gotta... I gotta write this email!

subtitles.english: Okay, okay, I'm ready, I'm ready, I'm ready!

subtitles.english: Exardia!

subtitles.english: Who wrote the play "Romeo and Juliet"?
